Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User is registered and has valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Enter username "testuser" in the login form.
2. Enter password "testpassword" in the password field.
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the main dashboard.

Title: Invalid Username
Test Steps:
1. Enter username "wronguser" in the login form.
2. Enter password "testpassword" in the password field.
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid username.

Title: Invalid Password
Test Steps:
1. Enter username "testuser" in the login form.
2. Enter password "wrongpassword" in the password field.
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid password.

Title: Successful Registration
Test Data: Username: newuser, Email: newuser@example.com, Password: newpassword
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter username "newuser" in the username field.
3. Enter email "newuser@example.com" in the email field.
4. Enter password "newpassword" in the password field.
5. Confirm password "newpassword".
6. Click on the register button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the login page.

Title: Duplicate Username
Preconditions: User with the same username is already registered.
Test Data: Username: existinguser, Email: existinguser@example.com, Password: existingpassword
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter username "existinguser" in the username field.
3. Enter email "existinguser@example.com" in the email field.
4. Enter password "existingpassword" in the password field.
5. Confirm password "existingpassword".
6. Click on the register button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating duplicate username.

Title: Successful Event Creation
Test Data: Event Name: New Event, Date: 2023-10-10, Time: 14:00, Description: This is a new event.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the event creation page.
2. Enter event name "New Event" in the event name field.
3. Enter date "2023-10-10" in the date field.
4. Enter time "14:00" in the time field.
5. Enter description "This is a new event" in the description field.
6. Click on the create event button.
Expected Result: Event is created successfully and user is redirected to the event list page.

Title: Empty Event Name
Test Data: Event Name: , Date: 2023-10-10, Time: 14:00, Description: This is a new event.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the event creation page.
2. Leave the event name field empty.
3. Enter date "2023-10-10" in the date field.
4. Enter time "14:00" in the time field.
5. Enter description "This is a new event" in the description field.
6. Click on the create event button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating empty event name.

Title: View Existing Event
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the event list page.
2. Click on the event with ID "12345".
Expected Result: Event details are displayed.

Title: Non-Existent Event
Preconditions: No event with the given ID exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the event list page.
2. Click on the event with ID "98765".
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating non-existent event.

Title: Update User Profile
Test Data: New Username: updateduser, New Email: updateduser@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter new username "updateduser" in the username field.
3. Enter new email "updateduser@example.com" in the email field.
4. Click on the update profile button.
Expected Result: User profile is updated successfully and user is redirected to the profile page.

Title: Empty Username
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Leave the username field empty.
3. Enter new email "updateduser@example.com" in the email field.
4. Click on the update profile button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating empty username.
